---
title: homework 1
date: 2026-03-27
categories:
  - gene46100
  - homework
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: false
    code-summary: "Show the code"
    code-tools: true
    code-overflow: wrap
date-modified: last-modified
draft: true
---

# Homework 1


- [ ] run all the code in the [notebook](https://github.com/hakyimlab/web-GENE-46100/blob/main/post/2025-03-25-unit00/hands-on-introduction_to_deep_learning.ipynb). You should also be able to find the notebook in your cloned course repository. (20 points)
- [ ] complete the exercises in the notebook (30 points)
- [ ] submit the jupyter notebook with the results to canvas assignment
